SEARCH
Package com.mps.deepviolet.api

Class ScanConfig

java.lang.Object
com.mps.deepviolet.api.ScanConfig
public final class ScanConfig extends Object
Configuration for TLS scanning. Use builder() to create instances.
Author:
Milton Smith

    Max time for a single host scan before it's marked as timed out.

    Milliseconds to sleep between section requests on the same host.

    Number of virtual threads.

  • Method Details

    • getThreadCount

      public int getThreadCount()
      Number of virtual threads. Controls overall scan tempo.

    • getSectionDelayMs

      public long getSectionDelayMs()
      Milliseconds to sleep between section requests on the same host.

    • getPerHostTimeoutMs

      public long getPerHostTimeoutMs()
      Max time for a single host scan before it's marked as timed out.

    • getCipherNameConvention

      public ISession.CIPHER_NAME_CONVENTION getCipherNameConvention()
      Cipher suite naming convention.

    • getEnabledProtocols

      public Set<Integer> getEnabledProtocols()
      Which TLS versions to probe, or null for all.

    • getEnabledSections

      public Set<ScanSection> getEnabledSections()
      Which scan sections to execute.

    • builder

      public static ScanConfig.Builder builder()
      Create a new builder with default values.

    • defaults

      public static ScanConfig defaults()
      Create a config with all defaults.
